case_title: VELARDE ROBERTO VS MCCAFFREY BRIAN J

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VELARDE ROBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT MCCAFFREY BRIAN J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF DEC-18-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-06-1992, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JAN-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
DEF CLAIMED HE WAS SERVED LAST WEEK.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELARDE ROBERTO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCCAFFREY BRIAN J STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDG.CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO A. LEONG.
